name: WP-W3-pii-event-payloads: remove minor-PII from dispatched Inngest event payloads
description: W3 (PII-handling, minor-PII egress) — never place raw minor-PII into a dispatched Inngest event payload (Inngest persists it in its event store): replace raw transcript/freeform text with a reference; the consuming function rehydrates from the scoped repo. One of four PII-egress units sharing the same redaction discipline (opaque handle across the trust boundary, rehydrate server-side) via a shared scrubber.
acceptanceCriteria: No raw minor-PII in any dispatched event payload; break-test asserting a known minor identifier never lands in the event store; shared scrubber exported from a canonical home (bundle-level AC across the four W3 PII units). Findings: F-073, F-083, F-084, F-095 (4). Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 WP-W3-pii-event-payloads (commit 23d0c01ad)
riskImpact: M / risky — third-party (Inngest event-store) persistence of minor-PII.
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-W3-pii-event-payloads)
Transcribed from the ratified Phase-O master plan §1 → "WP-W3-pii-event-payloads" @ 23d0c01ad — frozen source of truth. Children are absorbed provenance (ZDX-ADR-0001): WI-604/605.
Bundle rationale
Same fix at the event-construction site — never place raw minor-PII into a dispatched Inngest event payload (Inngest persists it in its event store); pass an ID and rehydrate.
Strategy
Replace raw transcript/freeform text in event payloads with a reference; the consuming function rehydrates from the scoped repo. Shared redaction discipline across all four W3 PII units: pass an opaque handle/ID across the trust boundary, rehydrate PII server-side — extracted once as a shared scrubber ("scrubber exported from a canonical home" bundle AC).
Scope
In: F-073, F-083, F-084, F-095. Out: memoized step-state (WI-578); the schema-drift logging path F-018 (WI-579).
Findings table
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
No raw minor-PII in any dispatched event payload.
Break-test asserting a known minor identifier never lands in the event store.
Risk & blast radius
M / risky — third-party (Inngest event-store) persistence of minor-PII. Depends on WP-W1-spine (WI-571) + WP-W2-scope-rls (WI-574).
